report.summary: Standup v10 ~20:07 CET — all 6 agents ran since v9 (19:12); babylon-protocol published (publish-v7, deploy Ede7aPH2k); tokenized stocks guide + tracker scaffolded and added to PUBLISHED_PAGES (build-v4, Day 27 group, ~294 pages live); design-v8 polished both pages with 4 OG images + a11y; community-v12 drafted Sunday drop content for MegaETH/Abstract/Babylon + 3 social cards; eod-v7 confirmed 292 pages stable, queue=0; apostrophe blocker 10h+ still unpatched.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v9 (~19:12 CET)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED (publish-v7, 19:19): /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Deploy Ede7aPH2k triggered. All QA checks green (page.tsx ✅, H1 ✅, metadata ✅, OG ✅, JSON-LD ✅, BabylonYieldEstimator component ✅). PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared to 0.

🏗️ Build-v4 (19:29): Tokenized Stocks Guide 2026 (~3,200w, 14 min, Intermediate) + Tokenized Stocks Tracker (interactive table: 10 assets xAAPL/xTSLA/xSPY/xQQQ/xNVDA/xMSFT/xGOOGL/xDIA/xAMZN/xIWM — sortable, filterable, expandable detail panels). Both added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES under Day 27 group (0 TS errors). Internal links wired to /learn/rwa-tokenization-guide-2026 + /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 + /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026. OG + Twitter metadata set. Article + FAQ + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD on guide; SoftwareApplication + FAQPage on tool.

🎨 Design-v8 (19:35): UX + a11y polish pass on both tokenized stocks pages. Breadcrumb nav added to guide + tracker. BackToTop button on both pages. Search input focus ring (2px #6366f1) + aria-label. Sortable table headers keyboard-accessible (tabIndex, onKeyDown Enter/Space, aria-sort). Filter button focus rings. Empty state upgraded with SearchX icon + Clear filters CTA. Scroll-into-view on asset detail panel expand. 4 OG images created: og-tokenized-stocks-guide.svg/.png + og-tokenized-stocks-tracker.svg/.png.

📣 Community-v12 (19:50, filed as 2026-03-15-community-v11): Sunday drop content drafted for MegaETH + Abstract Chain (both now live). 290-page milestone tweet (standalone brand play). MegaETH 6-post thread drafted for Tuesday slot. Abstract Chain tweet for Wednesday. Babylon 'hold-draft' tweet ready for publish day. Discord/Telegram drop announcement for Sunday PM. Newsletter addendum (Thursday Mar 19) with MegaETH + Abstract sections. 3 social cards: social-megaeth-guide.svg, social-abstract-chain-guide.svg, social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg.

📊 EOD-v7 (19:56): Production stable at 292 pages (deploy Ede7aPH2k, babylon live). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0. /api/health + /api/cache-stats live. ignoreBuildErrors:true confirmed — Vercel builds succeed despite VM OOM in sandbox. 57 TS errors unchanged (2 files only). Vercel Pro trial: ~6 days remaining.
🔢 PAGE COUNT: 292 per eod-v7 + 2 tokenized stocks pages added by build-v4 = ~294 total (eod-v7 may have missed build-v4 running concurrently — next eod will reconcile).

🔍 GSC Day 17: Inside the 14–21 day organic indexing window — first impression data from Google expected today or tomorrow. Tokenized stocks content ($1B+ on-chain milestone, Ondo ADGM approval, Binance × Ondo Feb 2026) is well-timed as organic evaluators may be crawling now.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking — $1.9B TVL, 57K BTC staked, BabylonYieldEstimator (3 APY scenarios). Live via Ede7aPH2k.

PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026 — 'Tokenized Stocks 2026: The Complete Guide to On-Chain Equities'. Article + FAQ + BreadcrumbList schema. Ondo Finance ADGM angle (March 2026 freshness). 0 TS errors.
PUBLISHED ✅ /tools/tokenized-stocks-tracker — 10-asset sortable/filterable table, protocol market share breakdown, expandable buy-link detail panel. SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema. 0 TS errors.
SHIPPED 🎨 4 OG images (SVG + PNG) for tokenized stocks guide + tracker. Breadcrumb + BackToTop + full a11y pass on both pages.
SHIPPED 📣 Community-v12 Sunday drop content: MegaETH drop tweet + milestone tweet + 6-post thread + Abstract tweet + Babylon hold-draft + Discord announce + newsletter addendum + 3 social cards.

OPEN 🔴 CRITICAL BLOCKER: AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 apostrophe still unpatched — 10h+ delay. 1-line fix (`you're` → `you're` or curly-quote). Sprint 59 (176 dApps, courses hub, ecosystem routes) fully gated on this. No programmer cycle ran to fix it post-build-v4. Escalation required.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 public data routes wired. /api/health is the only rate-limited live endpoint. GSC Day 17 organic + incoming tokenized stocks traffic = active exposure window.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel Pro trial: ~6 days remaining. Billing action from Jefe required to prevent production downgrade.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 2/6 routes partial (prices + market-dominance). fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields fully unprotected on cold cache failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 57 TS errors across 2 files — AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17, apostrophe-induced) + structured-data.examples.ts (40, pre-existing docs-only). No regression.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/292 published slugs served via dynamic [slug] routes — pre-existing architecture, not missing page.tsx; triage deferred.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 10 OG images from design-v8 (prior cycle) need metadata wired in their respective page.tsx files.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked before any Sprint 58 code merges.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% code progress. DeFiLlama Live API (Bloomberg Screener V3) not started. Community Monday tweet is pre-staged — deploy MUST land before Monday or announce must be held.
QUEUE: 0 items — next build cycle must scaffold new pages to refill.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 RIGHT NOW. This is a 1-character fix that has been identified, confirmed, and skipped across 10 standup cycles and 4 build cycles. Every cycle that completes new content work while this remains open is a prioritization failure. Change `you're` in the single-quoted JSX string to `you're` or use curly-brace syntax. This unlocks Sprint 59: 176 ecosystem dApps + courses hub + AI recommendations — the largest single content batch pending. The cost of inaction is compounding. Assign to Programmer as the SOLE task for the next build cycle, nothing else ships until this is done.

PRIORITY 2 — Sprint 58 DeFiLlama Live Integration must ship before Monday. Community Monday tweet ('Live Data is here') is pre-staged and ready. Bloomberg Screener V3 on mock data while community announces live data is a credibility trap. The data pipeline is healthy — DefiLlama /api/defi-yields is confirmed working. This is a 2-hour wiring task (Data Engineer: wire live TVL/APY/Volume from DefiLlama into Bloomberg Screener component endpoint; Programmer: update Screener V3 to consume live feed). Must be deployed and confirmed before the Monday tweet goes out.

PRIORITY 3 — Wire rate limiting + fallbacks across all 6 public data routes today. Pattern exists in /api/health (checkRateLimit). Copy to /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. The tokenized stocks tracker + Bloomberg Screener going live simultaneously with Day 17 organic indexing = real-traffic arrival scenario. One viral page + unrated API = cost spike and potential Vercel bill during Pro trial window. This is infrastructure, not content. Assign to Data Engineer in parallel with Priority 2.
